name: Grilled Flank Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 1-1/2 lb Beef flank Steak, 3/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. For the sauce, in a small saucepan cook onion, garlic, and chili powder in margarine until tender. Stir in tomato sauce, vinegar, honey, salt, and pepper. Bring to boiling, stirring constantly. Boil for 5 minutes or until slightly thickened.
2. Meanwhile, trim fat from flank steak. Score the steak diagonally into diamonds on both sides. Brush with sauce.
3. Grill steak on uncovered grill directly over medium coals for 7 minutes. Turn and grill to desired doneness, allowing 5-7 more minutes for medium. Brush occasionally with remaining sauce.
To serve, thinly slice the flank steak across the grain.
